race.description: Elite Sand And Soil Super Maiden Hcp
race.comment: NEAREST (2) debuts for a sharp Scone yard, which gets them going early. Comes off an easy 900m trial win there and looks to have good ability. Ready to go, and a bold run is on the cards. EXTREMELY PERFECT (4) led at Armidale when well supported but folded up. Had switched from a Sydney stable on a 46-day return. He can use the inside gate and improve enough to make the finish. HINTO (6) resumes and can feature if presented forward. Had a recent trial at Scone and has raced well first-up. Has to push forward from an awkward barrier, but he's well placed with the 4kg claim. BUBBLES PLEASE (9) was in the market but plain on debut. The blinkers go straight on and respect the stable. A much better effort is likely.
